title: [security vulnerability]  arbitrary order cancel
author: cvecommit-byte
body: Recently, our team found an arbitrary order cancel vulnerability in the latest version of the project. The vulnerability logic is present in the file:https://github.com/macrozheng/mall/blob/master/mall-portal/src/main/java/com/macro/mall/portal/controller/OmsPortalOrderController.java#93. The operation `com.macro.mall.mapper.OmsOrderMapper.updateByPrimaryKeySelective(com.macro.mall.model.OmsOrder)` is not protected by permission checks, which means an attacker can achieve arbitrary order cancel. To address this vulnerability, we strongly advise that developers implement access control policies that limit API access to admin users or the owner.

Thanks to the author's effort!

感谢作者的付出！

title: BaseRedisConfig中的 “RedisSerializer<Object> serializer = redisSerializer();” 里redisSerializer()爆红。
author: canqqq
body:
问题描述：BaseRedisConfig中的 “RedisSerializer<Object> serializer = redisSerializer();” 里redisSerializer()爆红。
截图如下：
![Uploading 1.png…
![3](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0a4c52c0-73cb-4455-8b22-5cd906bfb688)

![2](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/212eb04b-8088-48c1-8f47-3fc5bdc49e96)
]()

我在BaseRedisConfig类上也加上了@Configuration注解后，发现解决了爆红问题
![4](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e2ec1bb1-6644-4dbf-992a-936f742133c1)

这里想问一下大佬，我这样处理会影响程序的整体功能吗（我对Spring Boot的理解不够）。
